page_content:
AGNR489 Field Experience (1-4 Credits) Credit according to time scheduled and organization of the course. A lecture series organized to study in depth a selected phase of agriculture not normally associated with one of the existing programs. Restriction: Permission of AGNR-College of Agriculture & Natural Resources. Repeatable to: 4 credits if content differs. Formerly: AGRI489.

AGST389 Internship in Agricultural Education (1-3 Credits) An experiential learning course with a focus on non-formal agricultural education. This is a supervised learning experience within a career focused environment to assist in reﬁnement of a student's career interests prior to graduation. Restriction: Permission of the instructor. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
